news.headline: Ward 'definitely' wants to stay with Browns after Garrett trade
news.description: Browns cornerback Denzel Ward says he wants to remain in Cleveland, even after the team traded defensive end Myles Garrett to the Rams.

news.headline: Nico Collins' raise puts Texans' WR in line with booming market
news.description: Shortly after Collins signed an extension in 2024, the NFL quickly began to rewrite the WR market.

news.headline: How Ravens OC Declan Doyle can reboot Baltimore offense
news.description: Doyle, 30, is taking over a Baltimore offense that dropped to No. 16 in total yards after years of success.

news.headline: Lacking a star, Cowboys lean on depth for their pass rush
news.description: With the likes of Myles Garrett out of the picture, Dallas will lean on Rashan Gary and Malachi Lawrence in 2026.

news.headline: Chiefs banking on Xavier Worthy, young WR group to improve
news.description: Chiefs coach Andy Reid's biggest assistant hire this offseason might be his new receivers coach, Chad O'Shea.

news.headline: Is there any chance the Bears don't move to Indiana?
news.description: Is there any chance the Bears don't move to Indiana?
